sources.writer_profile: GastroMadrid is Madrid's dedicated gastronomy magazine and blog, with Julián Acebes as its lead writer. The publication produces in-depth neighbourhood-by-neighbourhood guides to the capital's restaurant scene, combining practical recommendations with editorial context. Its Barrio guides are among the most cited Spanish-language food references for Madrid.
sources.article_title: Restaurantes y bares imprescindibles por barrios de Madrid 2024 (series)

sources.writer_profile: Gastronomistas is a Madrid-based food journalism team whose writers cover the capital's restaurant scene with a critical eye. Javier Sánchez and Cristina Barbero contribute restaurant recommendations, annual best-of round-ups, and neighbourhood guides, with a focus on new openings and international cuisine arriving in the city.
sources.article_title: Mejores aperturas de restaurantes 2024 en Madrid; también mejores aperturas 2023; internacionales 2024; Chueca 2023

sources.writer_profile: Marta Bac is the Editorial Director of Time Out Madrid, where she oversees the publication's restaurant coverage and curates its annual lists of the city's best dining options. Her writing reflects a broad knowledge of Madrid's dining landscape, from neighbourhood classics to notable new openings. Note: Time Out operates food markets in several cities including Madrid, which represents a potential commercial conflict of interest.
sources.commercial_conflict_note: Time Out Group operates food markets in multiple cities including Madrid; commercial interests may influence restaurant recommendations.

sources.writer_profile: Lauren Aloise is a trained chef and longtime Madrid resident who founded Spanish Sabores to document her experience eating through the Spanish capital. She is also co-founder of Devour Tours, a food tour company with operations in Madrid. Her writing draws on deep local knowledge and years of personal dining experience across the city's neighbourhoods. Note: as a tour operator, some recommendations may reflect commercial considerations.
sources.article_title: Where to Eat in Madrid in 2025: The Ultimate Food Guide
sources.commercial_conflict_note: Lauren Aloise is co-founder of Devour Tours, a food tour operator in Madrid; recommendations may reflect tour commercial interests.

sources.writer_profile: Paz Álvarez is a food journalist at El País, Spain's national newspaper of record, where she contributes restaurant profiles and gastronomic features for the paper's gastronomy section. Her writing combines detailed reportage on chefs and restaurants with broader cultural context about Madrid's evolving dining scene.
sources.article_title: El gestor de la nueva 'playa' de Madrid

sources.writer_profile: Lucía Gavela is a food and lifestyle writer at Marie Claire España, covering the Madrid restaurant scene with a focus on innovative and design-conscious openings. Her restaurant recommendations highlight spaces that blend creative cooking with a strong aesthetic sensibility.
sources.article_title: Tres restaurantes nada típicos que merece la pena probar en Madrid este 2026

sources.writer_profile: José Carlos Capel is one of Spain's most distinguished food critics, who spent 35 years as the gastronomy critic for El País and is the founder and president of Madrid Fusión, the world-renowned annual gastronomy congress. His Gastroactitud platform publishes rigorous, detail-rich individual restaurant reviews from across Spain, with extensive Madrid coverage.

restaurants_raw.name: Angelita Madrid
dishes_mentioned: traditional recipes with a modern twist
restaurants_raw.quote: Wine bar directed by sommeliers David Villalón and Rubén Moreiro featuring more than five hundred wine references with daily-changing menus blending traditional and modern cuisine

restaurants_raw.name: La Tasquería
restaurants_raw.quote: Cocinamos incluso para gente que no le gusta la casquería. Realizamos un recorrido por diferentes partes de los animales. Chef Estévez fuses offal with haute cuisine transforming sweetbreads, brains, and suckling pig head into appetizing creations

sesos a la mantequilla negra con alcaparras
